threats.title: Cisco Patches CVE-2026-20230 in Unified CM as Exploit Code Goes Public
threats.summary: Cisco has patched a bug in Unified Communications Manager that lets an unauthenticated attacker on the network write files to the box and, from there, climb to root. It is tracked as CVE-2026-20230, and proof-of-concept exploit code is already public. Cisco's PSIRT says it has not seen the flaw used in attacks yet. The PoC shortens that runway. The flaw is a server-side request forgery.

threats.title: Claude Code GitHub Action Flaw Let One Malicious Issue Hijack Repositories
threats.summary: A security researcher found a flaw in Anthropic's Claude Code GitHub Action that let an attacker take over vulnerable public repositories running it, with nothing more than a single opened GitHub issue. Because Anthropic's own action repo used the same workflow, a working attack could have pushed malicious code into the action itself and onto the projects downstream that pull it. RyotaK of GMO

threats.title: Agentic AI Is Transforming Defense, But Only Secure IT Infrastructure Will Maximize It

threats.title: China-Linked TA4922 Expands Phishing Attacks to U.K., Germany, Italy, and South Africa
